description: Represents an AWS Supply Chain data lake dataset.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 1011  
Pattern: ^arn:aws:scn(?::([a-z0-9-]+):([0-9]+):instance)?/([a-f0-9]{8}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{4}-[a-f0-9]{12})[-_./A-Za-z0-9]*$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
